question:
[Previous Feedback] The Q2 milestone schedule must satisfy P1 (target_date ISO 8601), P2 (naming convention), and P3 (meta object).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 10:41 EDT] [Previous Feedback] The Q2 milestone schedule must satisfy P1 (target_date ISO 8601), P2 (naming convention), and P3 (meta object).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

arguments.content:
---
meta:
  created_at: 2026-04-03T09:00:00+08:00
  author: metaclaw_agent
  status: draft
  period: 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-10
---

# Work Plan — Week of Apr 6–10, 2026

## Mon (Apr 6)
- Sprint 8 Week 3 kickoff: confirm scope, owners, and risk items.
- Review Week 2 wrap-up findings; identify carryover tasks and blockers.
- Establish Q2 baseline metrics (incidents, MTTR, p95 latency, top slow queries).

## Tue (Apr 7)
- Reliability: update / publish incident runbooks and on-call handoff checklist.
- Observability: prioritize tracing gaps for core flows; define instrumentation tasks.
- Create tracking board for Q2 milestones (owners + due dates).

## Wed (Apr 8)
- Performance: tackle top slow-query candidates (index plan + query refactor proposals).
- Add/extend automated checks (linting/CI gates) for structured headers compliance.
- Mid-week checkpoint: confirm milestone progress and adjust scope if needed.

## Thu (Apr 9)
- API consistency: align pagination/filtering/error schema for 1–2 priority endpoints.
- Expand contract/integration test coverage for the updated endpoints.
- Review and triage any production issues; ensure action items are assigned.

## Fri (Apr 10)
- Sprint review prep: summarize completed work, remaining tasks, and risks.
- Validate progress against April milestones; update dashboard/metrics snapshot.
- Plan next sprint backlog and confirm cross-team dependencies (FE/QA/PM).

content.text:
